message:
refactor(node): gate policy module behind extended-surfaces and relocate imports to binary

lib.rs: Add #[cfg(feature = "extended-surfaces")] to the policy module,
continuing the feature-gating strategy for optional subsystems. This
prevents policy code from being compiled in minimal builds.

main.rs: Since the binary always enables extended-surfaces, add a local
`mod policy` declaration and move the policy sub-module imports
(bayesian_diagnostics, decision_engine, guardrail_monitor,
hardening_state_machine, policy_explainer) from the library re-export
to direct binary-local imports. Also add `pub use` re-exports for
observability and security modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
